blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,136 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing rain, highs of 34°F.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
